title: Kingavon 120 Lumen LED Headlamp Headlight with 3 Light Modes
features: Super bright and long-lasting 6 LED's to provide a quality white light and hands-free! Multi-use but ideal/handy for outdoors, fishing, cycling, mechanics, workshop, and hobbyist uses etc
Adjustable elasticated headband for comfort & tilting head plate for adjustable light angle
Adjustable elasticed headband for maximum comfort. Lightweight design so easy and fast to fit and ideal for long wearing times . Fits head and most caps and beanie hats too!
3 light modes of 50%, 100% & flash & requires 3 x AAA batteries which are not supplied.
description: Designed with your comfort in mind, the headlamp comes with an adjustable elasticated headband, ensuring a snug fit, and a tilting head plate for easy adjustment of the light angle. The headlamp offers three versatile lighting modes: 50%, 100%, and a flashing mode to suit your specific needs. Please note that it operates on three AAA batteries, which are not included. This headlamp is your perfect companion for a wide range of outdoor activities, including cycling, camping, fishing, hiking, and more. Illuminate your adventures with confidence and convenience.
